name: personal-claude-tools
description: Personal Claude Code plugins. Currently ships the cmux-agent-harness-loop plugin: a cmux-pane-based persistent multi-agent harness loop for general software development.

plugins.name: cmux-agent-harness-loop-plugin
plugins.description: cmux-only persistent multi-agent harness loop: Claude/OMC orchestrator + OMX/Codex reviewer panes for general software development. Subcommands: setup|status|plan|review|loop|handoff.
